nodes.context: A group of men in Manchester, England, active in the 1960s-1980s, considered by some to be organized criminals but by others a social friendship group.
A gang associated with Manchester United football club, involved in armed robberies in Holland.

edges.evidence_quote: Colin Blaney claims that members of the Quality Street Gang had links to a criminal element within the gang associated with the club known as the Inter City Jibbers, and carried out armed robberies together in Holland.
edges.context: The Quality Street Gang had links to the Inter City Jibbers and carried out armed robberies together in Holland.
